package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_model_hook_contains_external_io: Hooks that call HTTP clients, queues, file I/O, or external side effects.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule064NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule064NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule064NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario064Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule064NegativeService, input Rule064NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
